nodes.title: String
String
🖼️Input Image Usage:
widgets_values:
1. 🖼️Input Image.

2. Edit/Add 🍏Prompts, add ✨Loras if needed.

3. Adjust ⌚Duration or just leave it at 5 seconds. 
\
          - Set 🚶‍➡️Total Steps & 👞Split Steps. (4 Total/ 2 Split for Fast, 6 Total/ 3 Split for Good Quality, 8 Total/ 4 Split for Higher Quality)

4. Click on "🎲New Fixed Random" in 🎲Seed Node.

5. Generate Video (▷RUN).

6. Repeat step 4 & 5 until you get desire video shown in 🎥Preview.

7. While using the same 🎲Seed and without changing anything that is not in 🛠️Post Processing, change/edit 🛠️Post Processing Options, Generate Video (▷RUN) again as many times and skip through KSampler.

Video generated will be in your output folder - 🗂️ComfyUI/Output/*(Your filename input)*

🌀To start on a new video project, disable everything in 🛠️Post Processing and set 📺Final Video Mode to 🎥Preview.

nodes.title: 📤Load Images From Folder  Usage:
widgets_values:
1. Input 🗂️Folder Directory. *Example: C:\Pictures\ImagesForBatch*

2. Edit/Add 🍏Prompts, add ✨Loras if needed.

3. Adjust ⌚Duration or just leave it at 5 seconds. 
\
          - Set 🚶‍➡️Total Steps & 👞Split Steps. (4 Total/ 2 Split for Fast, 6 Total/ 3 Split for Good Quality, 8 Total/ 4 Split for Higher Quality)

4. Click on "🎲Randomize Each Time" in 🎲Seed Node.

5. ⚠️Set up 🛠️Post Processing Options *(You will not be able to change after generation.)*

6. Generate Video (▷RUN).

Video generated will be in your output folder - 🗂️ComfyUI/Output/*(Your filename input)*

🌀To start on a new Video batch, replace all your images in the folder or change a new 🗂️Folder Directory.

nodes.title: String
String
String
📤Load Images From Folder
widgets_values:
Input where your batch images are in the 🗂️Folder Directory
\
Example: C:\Pictures\ImagesForBatch


➰Start Index = At which image from folder to start 1st. (Sort by Name / Alphabetical Order)

- 0 = start from 1st image

- 1 = start from 2nd image

- 3 = start from 4th image

\
🛒Image Load limit = limit the amount of images to load from folder. (Sort by Name / Alphabetical Order)
- 0 = all

- 1 = 1st image from the folder.

- 5 = first 5 images from the folder. 

---
If you want to redo some images, just remove the ones that are done and leave the images in the folder for generating again in batch.

nodes.title: 💡Tips
widgets_values:
💡You can test your prompt and loras first using the single 🖼️Input Image.

Once sure with the prompt and loras, proceed to batch generating videos by "📤Load Images From Folder" mode.

---

💡This workflow is capable of generating different image sizes/dimensions in batch.

For mixed image sizes, standardize their output by using "📏Manual Scale Mode" to set a fixed "MegaPixels" that matches your hardware's capabilities. 

Downscaling larger images yields better output quality than upscaling smaller images.

---

## 💡For more information on everything else, click on the link to the detailed guide.

nodes.title: 🖼️📤I2V Mode
widgets_values:
🖼️Input Image = normal workflow, will be able to continue 🛠️Post Processing after video generation if no inputs are changed and using fixed 🎲Seed number (🎲New Fixed Random).

---

📚Images From Folder = Load all images from folder and generate video for each images with the same prompt and lora. *(Does not include subfolders)*.
Set "🎲Randomize Each Time" for 🎲Seed when using 📚Images From Folder.

- ⚠️Must set 🛠️Post Processing option before generating.

- ⚠️You will not be able to change or edit 🛠️Post Processing for batch images/videos

- ⚠️🎇Frame Select option is not compatible with batch videos.

- Set "🎲Randomize Each Time" for 🎲Seed when using 📚Images From Folder.

---

Press "f4" to jump to the current image use when doing batch.
